text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time for Eishin Flash's second summer camp,
her last and biggest chance to gear up for the
autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The impending end to this journey weighs heavily
on me, and I vow to commit the sight of Eishin
Flash running to my memory.
